Notice Of Moiton For An Order To Compel Responses; Award Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Samuel K. Feng, appeared for Defendant Roman Jacopi
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion To Compel Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories and Supplemental Production Of Documents is denied as moot as responses have been served. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $373.80, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
